SVGnest vendor source
=====================

This directory vendors the polygon-packer-algo package from:

https://github.com/yuriilychak/SVGnest

Vendored commit: 8dfa17fb6d84c0db30501a288989c43c96983c91

The upstream package declares the MIT license in its package metadata.
Local changes are limited to CodeCAD integration patches for explicit bin-hole
input and hole-aware placement correctness.
